LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER HANNAH CARMONA'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS BY AND BETWEEN HANNAH CARMONA AND CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING INC. PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA INSURANCE CODE 10134, ET SEQ. IS GRANTED. THE JULY 28, 2016 HEARING OF PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF PAYMENT RIGHTS IN CASE NUMBER CPF-16-515071 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. MR. CHAIT IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (D302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Hannah Carmona And Catalina Structured Funding Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Evan S. Chait (800-449-6311), for Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. appearing telephonically

Petitioner Hannah Carmona (650-248-7175), petitioner appearing In Propria Persona

No other appearances are made in this action

PETITIONER HANNAH CARMONA'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Hannah Carmona And Catalina Structured Funding Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is GRANTED. Court hears from Ms. Carmona and counsel for Catalina Structured Funding. Court vacates its tentative ruling. Court approves the settlement in this action. The July 28, 2016 hearing of PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Payment Rights in case number CPF-16-515071 is ordered off calendar. Mr. Chait is directed to prepare and submit a [proposed] order.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)
